executives.name: Marcelo Bastos
executives.background: Marcelo Bastos was appointed to the Board in February 2019. He is an experienced resources executive with over 30 years’ experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at BHP, Vale and MMG.

executives.name: Vanessa Guthrie
executives.background: Dr. Vanessa Guthrie was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 1 October 2020. She has over 30 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors and is a former CEO of Toro Energy Limited.
